massChanges.heading: Weekend Masses
massChanges.body: Saturday 6:00pm at St Monica's Walkerville and Sunday 9:30am at St Martin's Greenacres. Please contact the parish office if you need help with directions, accessibility, or first-visit questions.

topNotices.heading: Divine Mercy Sunday
topNotices.body: The Second Sunday of Easter is Divine Mercy Sunday. Parishioners and visitors are warmly welcome at the regular Sunday 9:30am Mass at St Martin's Greenacres.

topNotices.heading: St Martin's School — Term 2
topNotices.body: St Martin's Catholic Primary School begins Term 2 on Monday 28 April. Enrolment enquiries for 2027 are welcome through the school office on (08) 8211 2400.

topNotices.heading: Parish Office
topNotices.body: For Mass times, sacraments, pastoral care, planned giving, or first-visit questions, contact the parish office on (08) 8261 6200 or email admin@gwparish.org.au.

thisWeek.heading: Regular Weekday Mass
thisWeek.body: Weekday Masses continue according to the parish schedule. Please check the Mass Times page before travelling, especially around public holidays or school term changes.

thisWeek.heading: Good Giving Online
thisWeek.body: Parish giving can be arranged through Good Giving or by contacting the parish office for planned giving and direct deposit details.

thisWeek.heading: First-Time Visitors
thisWeek.body: If you are coming to Mass for the first time, arrive 10-15 minutes early so you can find a seat comfortably. Greeters and parishioners are happy to help.

thisWeek.heading: Safeguarding
thisWeek.body: Greenacres Walkerville Parish is committed to the care, safety, and dignity of every person. Safeguarding information and reporting contacts are available on the Safeguarding page.

communitySchool.heading: Community Welcome
communitySchool.body: Our parish includes Sri Lankan, Filipino, and broader Australian families across Greenacres and Walkerville. Children are welcome at Mass.

communitySchool.heading: Volunteer and Serve
communitySchool.body: Readers, hospitality ministers, music volunteers, altar servers, and outreach helpers all contribute to parish life. Contact the office if you would like to serve.

communitySchool.heading: Bulletin Archive
communitySchool.body: Past Connections bulletins remain available through the News & Events page for parishioners who want to catch up on earlier notices.
